mockTests.title: Mock Test 1 — GenAI Foundations
topics: What is Generative AI and how it differs from traditional AI
GenAI tools: ChatGPT, Gemini, Copilot, Claude
GenAI use cases in business and project management
Ethical considerations when using GenAI at work

mockTests.title: Mock Test 2 — AI in Planning
topics: Scope definition prompts and stakeholder mapping
AI-generated project charters and kickoff documents
Milestone tracking and Gantt chart automation
Prompt templates for planning phase deliverables
Planning quality gates with AI support

mockTests.title: Mock Test 3 — Execution & Monitoring
topics: Meeting minutes and action item extraction
Issue log automation and escalation detection
AI in stakeholder communication during execution
Real-time progress tracking tools and prompts

mockTests.title: Mock Test 4 — Risk Management
topics: Risk identification using AI brainstorming prompts
Qualitative and quantitative risk analysis with AI
Monte Carlo simulation concepts with AI
Risk response strategies generated by AI
Risk heat maps using AI tools

mockTests.title: Mock Test 5 — Resources & Automation
topics: AI integration with PM tools (Jira, Asana, Monday)
AI bots in project communication workflows

mockTests.title: Mock Test 6 — Quality & Ethics
topics: Defect prediction and test case generation
AI in code review and document review
Bias in AI outputs — detection and correction
Explainability and transparency in AI decisions
Responsible AI frameworks (EU AI Act, UNESCO)
Ethical prompt design and output validation

mockTests.title: Mock Test 7 — PMBOK & Agile
topics: Mapping GenAI to PMBOK 7th edition principles
AI in Agile ceremonies — sprint planning, retrospectives
Backlog generation and grooming with AI
User story writing with AI prompts
Hybrid project management and AI integration
Scrum master AI tools and use cases
AI for distributed and remote agile teams

mockTests.title: Mock Test 8 — Full Domain Mix
topics: Mixed questions from all 9 GSDC domains
Prompt selection best practice across domains

topics: Full GSDC December exam simulation — Set 1
